chapter_title.ar: باب فِي تَسْمِيَةِ مَنْ رَآهُ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 77 – Regarding the naming of the ones who saw him<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/8)

parts.text: مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْمَاعِيلَ بْنِ مُوسَى بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ
كَانَ أَسَنَّ شَيْخٍ مِنْ وُلْدِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) بِالْعِرَاقِ

text: رَأَيْتُهُ بَيْنَ الْمَسْجِدَيْنِ وَ هُوَ غُلَامٌ ( عليه السلام ) .

en.hubeali: (It has been narrated) from Muhammad Bin Ismail Bin Musa Bin Ja’far, and he was the most aged Sheykhs from the children of Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> in Al-Iraq. So he said, ‘I saw him<sup>asws</sup> between the two Masjids and he<sup>asws</sup> was a boy’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il ibn Musa ibn Ja‘far, the most senior (in his time) of the descendants of the Messenger of Allah, in Iraq has said the following. “I saw him (the twelfth Imam (a.s.)) between the two mosque while he was a boy.”
